function.description: Set a dotted key in an agent configuration file. Parses the file, applies the change, re-validates against the AgentConfig schema, and only writes when validation passes. Use this instead of FileEdit for structured config changes.
function.name: ConfigEdit

delete.description: When true, remove the key instead of setting it.

value.description: New value. Strings, numbers, booleans, arrays, and objects are supported.
